01-ai-strategy-landscape.instruction: Assess AI maturity on 1-5 scale: data readiness, talent, infrastructure, culture, leadership buy-in. Justify each.
01-ai-strategy-landscape.successMessage: Self-assessment is the starting point of every AI transformation.

02-building-the-business-case.instruction: Write a prompt to generate a business case for AI adoption: current costs, projected savings, timeline, risk factors.

03-ai-readiness-assessment.instruction: Create a 10-question AI readiness checklist. Each question reveals a gap or strength. Include scoring.
03-ai-readiness-assessment.successMessage: Any organization can use this checklist.

04-data-strategy.instruction: Audit your data: what you have, where stored, how clean, what's missing for AI. Create a readiness map.
04-data-strategy.successMessage: Data is AI fuel. Your audit shows where to invest.

05-team-and-talent.instruction: Design AI skills development plan: current gaps, training resources, timeline, competency measurement.
05-team-and-talent.successMessage: People are the hardest part of AI transformation.

06-vendor-evaluation.instruction: Create vendor evaluation matrix: 5 criteria with weights, scoring rubric, tie-breaking.
06-vendor-evaluation.successMessage: Structured evaluation prevents the most expensive mistake.

07-governance-and-ethics.instruction: Draft AI governance framework: who decides, approval process, data handling rules, audit schedule.
07-governance-and-ethics.successMessage: AI governance is how you scale AI responsibly.

08-change-management.instruction: Write a prompt for a change management plan for introducing AI to a resistant team. Objections, counter-arguments, quick wins, rollout.
08-change-management.successMessage: Change management is 80% of AI success.

09-measuring-ai-impact.instruction: Define 5 KPIs for AI impact. Each: what it measures, baseline, target, tracking method.

10-your-enterprise-ai-roadmap.instruction: 12-month AI roadmap: Q1-Q4 milestones, quick wins (month 1), strategic initiatives (month 6+), success criteria.
10-your-enterprise-ai-roadmap.successMessage: Roadmap turns AI strategy from slides into action.
